storage.title: Storage Space
storage.availableSpace: You have {size} available space for contacts and files
storage.clearConfirm:
Do you want to clear the cached storage data?

This will delete:
• Cached DXF files
• Temporary data
• Browser cache

Saved projects will not be affected.
storage.criticalWarning: Storage almost full! Clear it to avoid errors.

nameCascade.title: Contact Name Change
nameCascade.body: Changing the name from "{oldName}" to "{newName}" will automatically update the following:
nameCascade.warning: {count} records will be automatically updated across all projects.

addressImpact.title: Address Change Impact
addressImpact.body: Changing the "{addressLabel}" address may affect the following records:
addressImpact.sectionLive: Live references (will read the updated address)

branchDelete.title: Remove Branch Address
branchDelete.body: Are you sure you want to remove this branch address? This action cannot be undone.

mapDragWarning.title: Administrative Hierarchy Reset
mapDragWarning.body: Moving the pin will clear the administrative hierarchy fields (settlement, municipality, region). You will need to re-select from the hierarchy dropdown.

companyIdentityImpact.title: Company Identity Change Impact
companyIdentityImpact.body: The following identity fields are being modified:
companyIdentityImpact.sectionLive: Live references (will read the updated data)
companyIdentityImpact.warningLive: {count} records reference this contact and will reflect the new identity data.
companyIdentityImpact.unsafeClear: Cannot clear the field(s): {fields}. They are critical to company identity.
companyIdentityImpact.unavailableBody: The impact preview for company identity fields could not complete reliably. Saving was blocked to protect linked records. Please try again or review the system state later.

communicationImpact.title: Communication Change Impact
communicationImpact.body: The following communication fields are being modified:
communicationImpact.sectionLive: Live references (will read the updated data)
communicationImpact.warningLive: {count} records reference this contact and will use the new communication details.
communicationImpact.unsafeRemoval: Cannot remove all emails or phones from a company contact. At least one is required for communication workflows.

accessDenied.title: Unauthorized access
accessDenied.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

security.googleSignIn: You signed in with Google. Password is managed by Google.
security.refreshDescription: Force refresh your ID token to load updated permissions after admin changes
security.refreshBody: Use this after an administrator updates your roles or permissions. This will reload your access token with the latest custom claims.
security.refreshError: Failed to refresh permissions. Please try again.
security.twoFactorNotAvailable: Two-factor authentication will be available soon
security.sessionsNotAvailable: Session management will be available soon
security.revokeSessionDescription: This will sign out this device. The user will need to sign in again.
security.revokeAllDescription: This will sign out all devices except this one. Other users will need to sign in again.

email.selectAppropriate: Select the appropriate template for sending

twoFactor.backupFileNote:
Important: Each code can only be used once.
Store these backups in a safe place.
twoFactor.description: Protect your account with an extra layer of security using an authenticator app like Google Authenticator.
twoFactor.scanQrCode: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
twoFactor.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.enrollmentSuccess: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully!
twoFactor.backupCodesWarning: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication
twoFactor.disableDescription: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will reduce the security of your account.

voiceDictation.title: Voice dictation
voiceDictation.description: Speak to create a quick note. You can edit the text before saving.

voiceDictation.error: Voice dictation failed. Please try again.
voiceDictation.empty: Please enter or dictate some text first.
voiceDictation.authRequired: You must be signed in to save a note.

spaces.title: Spaces
spaces.subtitle: Physical spaces - What exists and where

info.title: Physical Spaces
info.description: Here you see all physical spaces in the buildings. Sales information is not included - only the physical layout and location.

info.title: Common Spaces
info.description: Here you see all common spaces in the buildings. Includes lounges, technical spaces, gardens and other shared areas.

apartments.description: Properties, maisonettes and studios for sale

storage.title: Available Storage
storage.description: Storage and warehouse spaces for sale

info.title: Saleable Properties
info.description: Here you see all properties that have been activated for sale. Includes prices, buyers, contracts and sales history.

info.title: Sold Properties
info.description: Here you see all completed property sales. Includes sales statistics, revenue, buyer profiles and performance metrics.

available.title: Available Properties
available.subtitle: Properties for sale - Active listings
available.noResults: No properties found matching these criteria.

info.title: Available Units
info.description: Here you see all units that are actively for sale. Includes prices, buyer interest and sales statistics.

tabs.videosHint: Videos are managed in Spaces → Properties

legal.title: Legal Process
legal.conflictBlockMessage: «{{name}}» is already assigned as {{existingRole}}. They cannot simultaneously serve as {{targetRole}}.
legal.conflictBlockLaw: Law 2830/2000, Art.22§2: Appointment as notary automatically revokes the status of lawyer. Art.37§1: Notary duties are incompatible with any other professional activity.
legal.conflictWarningMessage: «{{name}}» is already assigned as {{existingRole}}. Are you sure you want them to also serve as {{targetRole}}?
legal.conflictWarningLaw: Lawyers' Code of Ethics, Art.37: Providing assistance to both parties is prohibited. Simultaneously representing seller and buyer constitutes a conflict of interest.
legal.conflictWarningSure: Are you sure you want them to also serve as
legal.emailNotifyAssignBody: Would you like to send a notification email to «{{contactName}}» about the assignment of the role {{roleLabel}}?
legal.emailNotifyRemoveBody: Would you like to send a cancellation email to «{{contactName}}» about their removal from the role {{roleLabel}}?
legal.addBrokerHint: Add a broker from the project's Brokers tab
legal.terminateConfirm: Are you sure you want to terminate the agreement with {{name}}?
legal.exclusivityBlockedByProjectExclusive: Project-level exclusive ({{agentName}}). No new agreements allowed
legal.exclusivityBlockedByExistingProperty: Existing agreement on {{propertyName}} ({{agentName}}) must be terminated
legal.nonExclusiveBlockedByProjectExclusive: Project-level exclusive ({{agentName}}). No new agreements allowed
legal.nonExclusiveBlockedByPropertyExclusive: Exclusive on {{propertyName}} ({{agentName}}). No new agreements allowed
legal.duplicateAgent: Agent {{agentName}} already has an active agreement in this project
legal.noContracts: No contracts yet. Create the first one.
legal.noBuyerDesc: You must assign a buyer first (Reserve/Sell)

errors.noBuilding: The property is not linked to a building. Go to Property Management → Info and link a building.
errors.noFloor: The property is not linked to a floor. Go to Property Management → Info and select a floor.
errors.noProject: The building is not linked to a project. Go to Buildings → General and link a project.
errors.noCompany: The project is not linked to a company. Go to Projects → General and link a company.
errors.noAskingPrice: The property has no asking price. Set a price before reservation or sale.
errors.noArea: The property has no area (sqm). Set net or gross area before reservation or sale.

changePrice.title: Change Price
changePrice.description: Set the asking price for the property
changePrice.hint: The property will automatically be set to «For Sale» status

reserve.title: Reserve Property
reserve.noEmailWarning: The buyer has no email — no reservation confirmation will be sent. Please update their contact card.

sell.title: Sell Property
sell.warning: The property will be set to «Sold» status and will no longer appear in the available listings.

revert.title: Revert Property
revert.description: Cancel sale or reservation — the property returns to «For Sale» status
revert.warning: Buyer details, deposit and final price will be deleted. The asking price is preserved.

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.switchFailed: Failed to switch workspace. Please try again.

intro.title: Welcome to Error Management
intro.description: Let's explore your options when an error occurs. Each button has a different function.

retry.title: Try Again
retry.description: Attempt to retry the action that caused the error. Useful for temporary network issues.

back.title: Go Back
back.description: Return to the previous page. Use this if you want to avoid the error.

home.title: Go Home
home.description: Navigate to the application's home page. A safe option for a fresh start.

copy.title: Copy Details
copy.description: Copy the technical error details to your clipboard. Useful for sending to support.

email.title: Send Email
email.description: Send an email with the error details to the support team.

notify.title: Notify Admin
notify.description: Send an automatic notification to the system administrator about the error.

report.title: Anonymous Report
report.description: Submit an anonymous error report to help improve the application.

debug.title: Debug
debug.note: These tools are intended for development and support.

messages.noBuildings: No buildings linked to this project. Link a building first (Building → General → Project).
messages.noFloors: No floors in buildings. Add floors first.
messages.noProperties: No properties in buildings. Add properties first.
messages.propertiesWithoutArea: {count} property(ies) without area — millesimal calculation will be incorrect.
messages.propertiesWithoutFloor: {count} property(ies) without floor link — floor coefficient will not be calculated.
messages.populateSuccess: Populated {count} entries. Click "Calculate" to compute millesimal shares.
messages.airRightsNoShares: {count} air rights row(s) without millesimal shares. Enter air rights shares first.
messages.orphanedSingle: One building referenced in the table is no longer linked to this project.
messages.orphanedMultiple: {count} buildings referenced in the table are no longer linked to this project.
messages.orphanedAdvice: You can re-link the buildings or delete the table and recreate it.
messages.noAreaRows: {count} propert{count, plural, one {y} other {ies}} ({codes}) without area. Enter sq.m. first to calculate millesimal shares.
messages.spacesNoArea: {count} linked space{count, plural, one {} other {s}} without area: {codes}
messages.storageNoShares: Storage unit(s) with own shares enabled but no value: {codes}. Enter millesimal shares.

tooltips.method: Method A: By Area — distribution based on surface area. Method B: By Objective Value — weighted distribution based on zone price, floor coefficient (POL 1149/1994) and value coefficient. Method C: By Volume — distribution based on volume (area × floor height).
tooltips.zonePrice: Zone price (€/sq.m.) comes from the Ministry of Finance/AADE objective values table. Find the correct price at aades.gr → Objective Values → enter the property address. Used only in Method B (By Objective Value).
tooltips.commerciality: The Commerciality Coefficient determines whether Table A (< 1.5, residential) or Table B (≥ 1.5, commercial) from POL 1149/1994 is used for floor coefficients. Values: 0.6–3.0. Source: AADE objective property values. Used only in Method B.

landownersTab.title: Project Landowners
landownersTab.emptyState: No landowners. Add the first landowner.

removalGuard.confirmBody: You are about to remove "{name}" from the project landowners. The contact will not be deleted.
removalGuard.warningNote: You will need to manually update the ownership table after removal.
removalGuard.blockedBody: "{name}" is an owner of properties in this project. You must first remove the properties/spaces from this owner.

ownership.empty: No properties found. Click "Auto-Populate" to start.
